items.briefing:
Australia has been warned to prepare for quantum computing threats that could break current encryption methods, making it important for organisations to start planning updates to their security practices now. Separately, attackers are increasingly using stealthy techniques to compromise Microsoft 365 accounts — a platform widely used across Australian workplaces — by evading traditional detection tools, according to Barracuda researchers.

**Practical tip:** If your organisation uses Microsoft 365, ensure multi-factor authentication is enabled on all accounts and review login activity regularly for any unfamiliar locations or devices.

featured.title: Certes says be ready to protect data before Q Day hits
featured.quote: Only 3% of Australian businesses prepared for post-quantum cryptography threats.
